owned_files.notes: Complete implementation of proposal indexing, voting with weight snapshot, vote tally computation. All tests pass (proposal_indexes_after_storage, votes_tally_correctly, duplicate_vote_from_same_voter_is_ignored, ai_agent_vote_is_excluded, list_filters_by_scope). AI agents silently excluded per Accord (v0.116.0).

HTTP API endpoints: GET /api/v2/proposals (list with filters), GET /api/v2/proposals/{id} (fetch), GET /api/v2/proposals/{id}/tally. Straightforward Axum handlers with error responses. Fully implemented.

9 proposal types defined: 5 local (parameter_change, schema_add, treasury_grant, juror_pool_lottery, local_rule), 4 civilization (accord_amendment, accord_interpretation, federation_floor_policy, schema_civilization_register). Thresholds, quorum fractions, durations all specified. Hot-reloadable.

summary: Governance scope fully operational: 9 proposal types, indexing + tally shipped, AI exclusion enforced. Ready for Phase 3 civilization-scope federation if new dispute arbitration required.
